systems: Ahmedabad Public Library / M.J. Library Network
ifla_metric_frame: staff/internet/program metrics marked as gaps when not normalized
limitations: Ahmedabad accessibility is a ward-centroid proxy, not a scheduled transit routing model.
Toronto median-resident travel-time accessibility is not computed in this branch.
Finance years differ because the table uses latest locally normalized values for each system.
Toronto collection value is a lower bound because the source states more than 10.5 million items.
